channel.title: Digital Drift
channel.description: Backend, AI, and programming blogs by Dhiraj Roy.

item.title: Spring Boot REST API (2026) – Java 21 Production Setup
item.description: Learn how to build a production-ready Spring Boot 3 REST API using Java 21, virtual threads, record classes, and modern backend architecture.

item.title: What is Backend Development? The Complete Beginner's Guide
item.description: Understand what backend development really is — servers, APIs, databases, authentication, and how all the pieces fit together to power every app you use.

item.title: Node.js Backend Development (2026) – Build a Production-Ready REST API
item.description: Learn Node.js backend development from scratch. Master Express.js, async programming, and build a production-ready REST API. Complete 2026 developer guide.

item.title: Docker Complete Guide: From Zero to Production Containers
item.description: Master Docker end-to-end — containers vs VMs, Dockerfiles, volumes, networking, Docker Compose, multi-stage builds, and production best practices.

item.title: Git & GitHub Complete Guide: From Zero to Production Workflow
item.description: Master Git and GitHub end-to-end — version control fundamentals, essential commands, branching strategies, pull requests, and CI/CD workflows used in real teams.

item.title: Getting Started with Spring Boot: Build Your First REST API
item.description: A hands-on guide to Spring Boot — project setup, key annotations, controllers, and a working REST API in under 30 minutes.
